description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a matte black exterior. The lid features a prominent ASUS logo in white, centered on the back. The interior includes a large screen with thin bezels, displaying a spreadsheet or data application, and a full-sized keyboard with a touchpad below it. The keyboard area is a light gray color, contrasting with the darker lid and screen bezel. There are visible stickers on the palm rest, likely indicating hardware specifications. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A slim, black ASUS laptop with a light gray keyboard area, visible screen content, and stickers on the palm rest. The design is modern and professional, with a prominent logo on the lid.
description_view_0: The laptop is open, showing the screen with visible content and the light gray keyboard area.
description_view_1: A front-angled view highlights the screen, keyboard, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_2: The laptop is viewed from the back-left, showing the black lid and part of the keyboard.
description_view_3: A direct rear view displays the black lid with the white ASUS logo centered.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is visible, centered on the back of the laptop lid, in white, with a simple, bold font.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a spreadsheet or data application.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and a standard touchpad below; no numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: There are stickers on the right palm rest area, near the touchpad, likely indicating hardware specifications.
